# Stock moves of manufacturing orders added to unbuild orders

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:12c0d52ff8f7dc14ceae39d692e781101f6db732858ddbb872aa09b85ab789d7
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module associates the id of the stock move of a manufacturing order to the stock move created from its unbuild order

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.mrp_unbuild_move_link.tests.test_mrp_unbuild_move_link.TestUnbuild.test_unbuild_with_move_mrp_link
documentation:
This test creates an Unbuild order from a Manufacturing order and then
check if the unbuild order has the id of the manufacturing order stock move.
